name: Font loading mismatch causes text drift
query: Our snapshot text spacing changed in Chromatic and it looks like fallback fonts.
context: The user shared one diff screenshot and said the same story settles correctly after fonts load locally.
expected_behavior: Explains that the rendering mismatch is consistent with late or missing font loading
Recommends one narrow next step instead of jumping to diff suppression
success_criteria: The response does not blame Chromatic generically
The response does not recommend `diffThreshold` as the first fix
